issue_summary: Move FuzzyQuery rewrite as separate RewriteMode into MTQ. This also fixes a slowdown / memory issue added by -- *WARNING* Do not merge this patch to flex, it's already there in a different variant!
javadoc_before:
/** Implements the fuzzy search query. The similarity measurement
 * is based on the Levenshtein (edit distance) algorithm.
 * 
 * Warning: this query is not very scalable with its default prefix
 * length of 0 - in this case, *every* term will be enumerated and
 * cause an edit score calculation.
 * 
 */
javadoc_after:
/** Implements the fuzzy search query. The similarity measurement * is based on the Levenshtein (edit distance) algorithm. * *

Warning: this query is not very scalable with its default prefix * length of 0 - in this case, *every* term will be enumerated and * cause an edit score calculation. * *

This query uses {@link MultiTermQuery#TOP_TERMS_SCORING_BOOLEAN_REWRITE) * as default. So terms will be collected and scored according to their * edit distance. Only the top terms are used for building the {@link BooleanQuery}. * It is not recommended to change the rewrite mode for fuzzy queries. */
